# libredash publish

Publish a configuration-as-code project

## Usage

```sh
libredash publish [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--auto-approve` | bool | `false` | approve and activate the publish without prompting |
| `--environment` | string | `dev` | publish environment |
| `--project` | string | `dashboards/libredash.yaml` | project path |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
